MATH_MERCHANT.SUMMARY.TITLE: Shopping Summary
MATH_MERCHANT.SUMMARY.DRAG_HINT: Drag the title bar to move
MATH_MERCHANT.SUMMARY.EMPTY_HINT:
Middle-click cards, potions, relics, or card removal in the shop to show the purchase summary here.
If Membership Card is selected, the summary automatically prices it first for the cheapest total.
MATH_MERCHANT.SUMMARY.MEMBERSHIP_PRIORIT: Using the cheapest order: Membership Card is treated as the first purchase.
